name: User Authentication Backend
description: POST /auth/signup, POST /auth/login — JWT-based signup, login, token refresh, and user session management.

name: Auth UI
description: Login and signup forms, user session management in frontend (e.g., localStorage for tokens).

name: Product Catalog Backend
description: GET /products, POST /products, PUT /products/{id}, DELETE /products/{id} — CRUD operations for product data (name, price, description).

name: Product Catalog UI
description: Display product list, forms for adding new products, and editing existing product details.

name: Inventory Management Backend
description: PUT /inventory/{product_id}, GET /inventory/{product_id} — API for updating and retrieving current stock levels for products.

name: Inventory Management UI
description: User interface to view current stock levels and adjust them for individual products.

name: Shopping Cart Backend
description: POST /cart/add, DELETE /cart/remove/{item_id}, GET /cart — Manages items in the current sales transaction (in-session cart).

name: Shopping Cart UI
description: User interface to add/remove items to the cart, display cart contents, and show total price.

name: Checkout Backend
description: POST /checkout — Processes the sale, deducts inventory, creates an order record, and generates a receipt.

name: Checkout UI
description: User interface for the checkout flow, including payment confirmation and order summary display.

name: Order History Backend
description: GET /orders, GET /orders/{id}/receipt — Stores and retrieves past sales transactions and their associated receipts.

name: Order History UI
description: User interface to view a list of past orders and retrieve/display individual receipts.
